languages.original_text: "It's simple: my shereen the Lord Captain has a nose for profit. You'd be surprised how useful it can be to have a flexible mindset, tin can."

languages.text: "Все просто: шерин не чуждо понимание выгоды. Ты удивишься, как полезно бывает иметь гибкое мышление, железяка".
"It's simple: my shereen the Lord Captain has a nose for profit. You'd be surprised how useful it can be to have a flexible mindset, tin can."
languages.original_text: "Все просто: шерин не чуждо понимание выгоды. Ты удивишься, как полезно бывает иметь гибкое мышление, железяка".

traits.locale_text: "It's simple: my shereen the Lord Captain has a nose for profit. You'd be surprised how useful it can be to have a flexible mindset, tin can."
"It's simple: my shereen the Lord Captain has a nose for profit. You'd be surprised how useful it can be to have a flexible mindset, tin can."
"It's simple: my shereen the Lord Captain has a nose for profit. You'd be surprised how useful it can be to have a flexible mindset, tin can."

languages.text: 「シンプルに言うと、私のシャリーン、ロード・キャプテンは利益を見つける嗅覚がある。柔軟な考え方がいかに役立つのか、缶詰は驚くだろう。」
languages.original_text: "It's simple: my shereen the Lord Captain has a nose for profit. You'd be surprised how useful it can be to have a flexible mindset, tin can."

traits.locale_text: 「シンプルに言うと、私の主であるキャプテン・ロードは利益を見つける嗅覚がある。柔軟な考え方がいかに役立つのか、缶詰は驚くだろう。」

languages.text: « C'est simple : {mf|mon|ma} shereen {mf|le seigneur-capitaine|la seigneure-capitaine} sait flairer le profit. Vous n'imaginez pas combien il peut être utile d'avoir l'esprit flexible, boîte de conserve. »
languages.original_text: "It's simple: my shereen the Lord Captain has a nose for profit. You'd be surprised how useful it can be to have a flexible mindset, tin can."

traits.locale_text: « C'est simple : {mf|mon|ma} shereen {mf|le seigneur-capitaine|la seigneure-capitaine} sait flairer le profit. Vous n'imaginez pas combien il peut être utile d'avoir l'esprit flexible, boîte de conserve. »

languages.text: "Es ist ganz einfach: Mein Shereen, der Lord Captain, hat einen Riecher für Profit. Ihr wärt überrascht, wie hilfreich eine flexible Geisteshaltung sein kann, Blechdose."
languages.original_text: "It's simple: my shereen the Lord Captain has a nose for profit. You'd be surprised how useful it can be to have a flexible mindset, tin can."

traits.locale_text: "Es ist ganz einfach: Mein Shereen, der Lord Captain, hat einen Riecher für Profit. Ihr wärt überrascht, wie hilfreich eine flexible Geisteshaltung sein kann, Blechdose."

languages.text: "Çok basit: Lord Kaptan şirinimin kâr kokusu alan bir burnu var. Esnek bir zihniyete sahip olmanın ne kadar yararlı olabileceğine şaşırırsın tenekecik."
languages.original_text: "It's simple: my shereen the Lord Captain has a nose for profit. You'd be surprised how useful it can be to have a flexible mindset, tin can."

traits.locale_text: "Çok basit: Lord Kaptan şirinimin kâr kokusu alan bir burnu var. Esnek bir zihniyete sahip olmanın ne kadar yararlı olabileceğine şaşırırsın tenekecik."

languages.text: «Es bien sencillo: mi shereen {mf|el|la} Lord Capitán tiene olfato para los negocios. Le sorprendería lo útil que puede llegar a ser una actitud flexible, mi amigo de hojalata».
languages.original_text: "It's simple: my shereen the Lord Captain has a nose for profit. You'd be surprised how useful it can be to have a flexible mindset, tin can."

traits.locale_text: «Es bien sencillo: mi shereen {mf|el|la} Lord Capitán tiene olfato para los negocios. Le sorprendería lo útil que puede llegar a ser una actitud flexible, mi amigo de hojalata».

languages.text: “很简单。我亲爱的舰长大人天生拥有赚大钱的敏锐嗅觉。有一个灵活的头脑是何等地有用，你这铁罐头怕是想象不到。”
languages.original_text: "It's simple: my shereen the Lord Captain has a nose for profit. You'd be surprised how useful it can be to have a flexible mindset, tin can."
